sqlMap.select: select * from AccountAddress where AccountKey = #AccountKey# and AddressKey = #AddressKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AccountAddress(AddressKey, AccountKey CreatedDate CreatedBy ) values (#AddressKey:NUMERIC#, #AccountKey:NUMERIC# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# )
sqlMap.select: select CreatedDate, CreatedBy, AddressKey, AccountKey from AccountAddress where AddressKey = #AddressKey# and AccountKey = #AccountKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AccountAddress set
CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null
where AddressKey = #AddressKey# and AccountKey = #AccountKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AccountAddress where AddressKey = #AddressKey# and AccountKey = #AccountKey#
delete from AccountAddress where AccountKey = #AccountKey# and AddressKey = #AddressKey#
sqlMap.select: select CreatedDate, CreatedBy, AddressKey, AccountKey from AccountAddress where AddressKey = #AddressKey# and AccountKey = #AccountKey#
select AddressKey, AccountKey, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from AccountAddress where AccountKey = #AccountKey# and AddressKey = #AddressKey#
